name: SYPRIS SOLUTIONS INC
sic_description: Industrial Instruments For Measurement, Display, and Control
summary: Sypris Solutions, Inc. is a Delaware corporation formed in 1997 that operates two segments: Sypris Technologies, which produces forged, machined, welded, and heat-treated steel components for heavy commercial vehicles and high-pressure energy pipelines; and Sypris Electronics, which provides circuit card assembly, full box build manufacturing, systems integration, and design services for aerospace, defense, and space markets. The company serves customers globally through North American operations, often under multi-year, sole-source contracts.
